name: Black Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in water to cover. Drain.
2. Reserve the soaking liquid.
3. Add water, if needed, to make 2 quarts total (for 8 cups of soup, adjust as required).
4. Put the beans and water in a large soup pot.
5. Add the onion, celery, and ham bone.
6. Bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat.
8. Simmer, partially covered, until the beans are soft (3-4 hours), adding more water as needed to replace any which evaporates.
9. Remove the ham bone.
10. Puree in a blender or food processor.
11. Add the cooked ham.
12. Reheat.
13. Season with mustard, lemon juice, salt, and a generous amount of pepper.
14. Serve with a tablespoon of hot cooked rice and a sprinkling of chopped onion per serving, or with a thin slice of lemon and several slices of hard-cooked egg per serving.
